description:
Parent epic: V3 E1: Simplified DSL foundation

Source task 9/13 from MILESTONE_V3.md:

- Remove dead verifiers/entities created only for discarded DSL shapes.

Epic closure criteria:
- the simplified DSL is the only documented DSL
- pre-V3 DSL shapes are removed
- DSL tests cover success, failure, and error-message quality

comments.text: Removed legacy Spark sections, top-level memory parser registration, legacy placement verifier, and lifecycle guardrail entities. Added forbidden-section macros so discarded V3 shapes fail fast. Verified format, compile --warnings-as-errors, and full mix test.

title: E1: Remove dead verifiers/entities created only for discarded DSL shapes
